title: Image2 테크 포스터 - Tech The Future Is Now
summary: Image2 Hub의 포스터 / 테크 포스터 카테고리에서 가져온 이미지 생성 스타일입니다. 한국어 텍스트가 필요한 장면은 한국어 라벨과 카피를 사용하도록 조정했습니다.
prompt: Create an image. International top-tier tech launch visual poster, minimalist futuristic design, deep pure black background, generous negative space, 9:16 vertical composition. Tech visual style similar to Apple, Toss, Notion and Linear. Clean minimalist 3D hero graphic; rendering quality: premium C4D / Octane Render look, frosted glass material. Typography and layout: centered composition. Theme: The Future Is Now — technology changes the world, innovation drives the future. Use Korean-language copy, labels, captions, titles, and UI text wherever text appears; keep all text readable and culturally natural for Korean users.
